Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: Team kicks off a new resto-mod project with a rare, but rusted Mopar.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: '70 Challenger

Video.summary: Team salvages rotted out '70 Challenger with how-to weld in a new metal roof, drip rails and A-pillars.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Roof Skin

Video.summary: Chassis guru Jeff Schwartz brings in his G-Machine chassis to convert uni-body Challenger to a full frame.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Framed

Video.summary: Final Mopar sheet metal tech - how to weld in a new trunk pan and fabricate a front cowl panel from scratch.
Video.title: Project Ultra Violet: Body Beautiful

Video.summary: Team grafts world's first low deck, all aluminum Hemi and T56 six speed gearbox into '70 Challenger resto-mod.
Video.title: Crazy Hemi

Video.summary: Team fabs high flow EFI fuel system, serpentine belt drive and dual fan cooling system for '70 Hemi Challenger
Video.title: Mopar Makeovers

Video.summary: Project Ultraviolet, the 1970 Challenger Pro Touring ride takes its maiden voyage
Video.title: Ultraviolet Payoff

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: Chris Ryan's "Scarlet Lady," a custom '56 Continental Mark II, embodies truly extraordinary craftsmanship.
Video.title: Chris Ryan - Scarlet Lady

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: This project will result in a diesel rig by combining both old and new, Dodge chassis and Ford cab.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 1

Video.summary: We'll straighten out our 1997 Dodge frame before setting our 1979 Ford F-350 body on it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Video.summary: We're modifying our 1997 Dodge frame before bolting our 1979 F-350 body to it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Video.summary: Super Dually gets a coating of sound insulation and spray-on bed liner.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Video.summary: Project: SuperDually gets new a new steering shaft, headlights and under hood paint.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 8

Video.summary: We're adding a water/methanol kit to a '05 Dodge Ram 2500 diesel and a cold air kit to Project Super Dually.
Video.title: Diesel Power Upgrades

Video.summary: Project Super Dually gets a new interior and bumpers!
Video.title: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Video.summary: A good find: Marc and Tommy go on the hunt for a certain top-shelf Mopar.
Video.title: Hard Charger

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Dodge Charger needs some sheet metal replaced.
Video.title: Hard Charger: Heavy Metal

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew cuts a rusty old floor out of a '69 Dodge Charger and replace it.
Video.title: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Image.alt: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Video.summary: The time has come to paint Project Hard Charger.
Video.title: Hard Charger…or Midnight Rider?

Video.summary: Work continues on a 1969 Dodge Charger to adapt a Hellcat drivetrain to work in it; Tommy visits OPGI.
Video.title: Hard Charger – Hellcrate Install

Video.summary: The ’69 Dodge Charger gets a new custom exhaust to go with that Hellcrate Engine.
Video.title: Exhausted Hard Charger!

Video.summary: Tommy puts the finishing touches on Project Hard Charger's hood.
Video.title: Charger Hood and Interior

Video.summary: We take Hard Charger to the Mopar Nationals in Ohio to give it a final shakedown.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Hits the Street

Video.summary: We head to Dallas for the Mecum Auction and run our Hellcat powered Charger across the block.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Goes to Mecum

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: Our 305 Small Block Chevy and 302 Small Block Ford return for another round of the brand loyalty war.
Video.title: Small Block Showdown Round 4

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle Undertakes a mission to squeeze everything that they can out of a tired Iroc Z.
Video.title: Iroc and So Can You!

Video.summary: The guys squeeze their budget and also do some free fixes to freshen up the budget Iroc’s interior.
Video.title: Low Buck Iroc Interior

Video.summary: Take a look at how SEMA cars are built just a couple of weeks out from the big show
Video.title: SEMA Mustang Thrash

Video.summary: Learn a low-buck way to rescue faded, nasty paint. Also, the budget IROC goes for a drive.
Video.title: IROC Paint Overhaul and Payoff

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: Project Henchman is hoping to get a new look with a new paint job that'll make this '69 Pontiac GTO shine.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 4 - Prison Tats

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton embark on their next project, a 2019 Dodge Charger, and give it a full super charger upgrade.
Video.title: Fully Charged

Video.summary: The EBC Brakes and Pedal Commander Charger gets its voice as Tommy installs the exhaust and suspension.
Video.title: Singing Lessons

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: It's an OBS Chevy K1500 4WD we converted to AWD, slammed, and LS swapped!
Video.title: Chevy K1500 Red Tide
